command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT * FROM research_field_images LIMIT 10;

rows.prompt: Abstract visualization of artificial intelligence and machine learning. Neural network patterns, glowing nodes and connections, flowing data streams, circuit board aesthetics, holographic elements.
Abstract visualization of human-computer interaction and user experience design. Flowing interface elements, gesture interactions, touch points, user journey paths, wireframe aesthetics.
Abstract visualization of data science and analytics. Flowing charts, graph lines, data points, statistical visualizations, geometric patterns, dashboard elements.
Abstract visualization of information retrieval and natural language processing. Flowing text streams, word clouds, language patterns, search algorithms, semantic networks.
Abstract visualization of social computing and networks. Connected nodes, community clusters, network graphs, social connections, communication flows.
Abstract visualization of privacy and security in computing. Shield symbols, encryption patterns, lock mechanisms, secure data flows, cryptographic elements.
Abstract visualization of health informatics and medical data. Medical symbols, health data streams, patient records, healthcare networks, bioinformatics patterns.
Abstract visualization of education technology and online learning. Digital classroom elements, knowledge networks, learning paths, educational platforms.
